## 🔧 Tool Request

### Tool Name
[Name of the thinking tool]

### Category
- [ ] Create (Brainstorming, solution design)
- [ ] Decide (Making choices, evaluating risks)
- [ ] Diagnose (Troubleshooting, analyzing causes)
- [ ] Research (External analysis)
- [ ] Systems (Complex situations, organizations)
- [ ] Execute (Execution discipline, task management)

### Purpose
[One sentence describing what this tool does]

### When to Use
- [Trigger scenario 1]
- [Trigger scenario 2]
- [Trigger scenario 3]

### How It Works
[Detailed explanation of the tool's methodology]

### Example Usage
```
User: "[Example question]"

AI: "[Example response using the tool]"
```

### References
- [Academic papers, books, or articles]
- [Links to existing implementations]

### Why This Tool?
[What gap does this fill? How does it complement existing tools?]

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing tools to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This tool has clear, actionable steps
- [ ] This tool includes examples
- [ ] This tool fits into an existing category
